### [`v2.32.0`](https://redirect.github.com/onsi/ginkgo/releases/tag/v2.32.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/onsi/ginkgo/compare/v2.31.0...v2.32.0)

#### 2.32.0

`-fd` generate RSpec-style documentation output.  Thank [@​woodie](https://redirect.github.com/woodie) !
\--sleep-on-failure pauses a failed spec before teardown. Thanks [@​qinqon](https://redirect.github.com/qinqon) !

</details>
